title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other LLMs locally with a single command-line tool and Docker-like model management.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage local models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; consume the Ollama REST API with promises or streams.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding components.

title: llama-index-integrations-llms-ollama
summary: LlamaIndex LLM and embedding connectors for Ollama; build local RAG pipelines.

title: chainlit/chainlit
summary: Python chat-UI framework with built-in Ollama support; prototype LLM apps in minutes.

title: ollama-webui/ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (formerly Ollama-WebUI) for chatting, model management, and RAG; runs in Docker.

title: ollama-chatbot
summary: Minimal React chatbot example consuming Ollama’s local API with streaming.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI wrapper around Ollama with readline history and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that routes GitHub Copilot calls to a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama; synchronous and asynchronous APIs with POJO models.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping Ollama REST API; supports chat, completions, and embeddings.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Docker Compose stack bundling Ollama, Open WebUI, Weaviate, and QDrant for instant local RAG.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 component providing Ollama generators and chatters for NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that answers prompts using your local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with chat, completion, and embedding APIs; targets .NET 6+.

title: ollama-codex
summary: CLI tool mimicking OpenAI Codex but backed by local Ollama models for code generation.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Python notebook demonstrating RAG with Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-slackbot
summary: Slack Bolt app that forwards channel messages to Ollama and streams responses back.
